docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ EDGAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO EDGAR LOPEZ, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ EDGAR $1,294.10 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,379.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $34.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $61.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ EDGAR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ EDGAR
